tasks.subject: Task 1: Phase 1 â€” Migrate to built-in Kotlin
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove the external `org.jetbrains.kotlin.android` / `kotlin.plugin.compose` plugins and switch to AGP 9.2.1's bundled Kotlin 2.2.10, eliminating the `applicationVariants` obsolete API warnings and the plugin deprecation warning.

**Files:**
- Modify: `gradle/versions.gradle`
- Modify: `gradle.properties`
- Modify: `settings.gradle`
- Modify: `build.gradle`
- Modify: `CLAUDE.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --warning-mode all` produces zero `w:` lines mentioning `kotlin.android`, `applicationVariants`, `testVariants`, or `unitTestVariants`
- [x] `./gradlew assembleDebug` completes without error
- [x] `CLAUDE.md` toolchain table shows Kotlin 2.2.10 and KSP 2.2.10-2.0.2

```json:metadata
{"files": ["gradle/versions.gradle", "gradle.properties", "settings.gradle", "build.gradle", "CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon --max-workers 2 --warning-mode all 2>&1 | grep \"^w:\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["zero w: lines mentioning kotlin.android or applicationVariants", "assembleDebug BUILD SUCCESSFUL", "CLAUDE.md toolchain table updated to Kotlin 2.2.10 and KSP 2.2.10-2.0.2"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Phase 2 â€” Fix remaining code warnings
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Eliminate the three remaining warnings: JVM native access restriction from `gradle.properties`, and two Room KSP warnings in `MessengerDao.kt`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `gradle.properties`
- Modify: `gradlew`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/chat/prv/sync/MessengerDao.kt`
- Modify: `CLAUDE.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] Zero `WARNING:` lines about restricted System methods
- [x] Room KSP emits no warnings for `MessengerDao.getConferencesLiveData`
- [x] Targeted warning categories eliminated

```json:metadata
{"files": ["gradle.properties", "gradlew", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/chat/prv/sync/MessengerDao.kt", "CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew clean kspDebugKotlin compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon --max-workers 2 --rerun-tasks --warning-mode all 2>&1 | grep -E \"^WARNING:\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["zero WARNING: lines about restricted System methods", "Room KSP no warnings for MessengerDao.getConferencesLiveData"]}
```
